subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. I’m happy to set up a short introductory call next week. Send over a few times that work for you, and I’ll coordinate from there.

I can’t share internal contact directories or direct phone numbers for our team, but I can help route the right introductions once we’ve got the call on the calendar.

Best,
Agent
